prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic nighttime street scene in rainy Tokyo, horizontal 16:9 composition. A solitary young woman stands slightly right of center outside a brightly lit convenience store, holding a transparent plastic umbrella above her head and a white takeaway coffee cup near her mouth. She wears an oversized light beige rain jacket over a long dark skirt, with damp dark hair and a calm, introspective posture; keep the face softly blurred and indistinct. The store windows glow warm yellow and reveal shelves of products, with visible Japanese-style signage including a “24 OPEN” sign and a staff recruitment notice. The wet asphalt street stretches into the background on the left, reflecting red traffic lights, neon shop signs, and car headlights; include one taxi-like car at the far left foreground, a red traffic signal high left, narrow urban buildings, poles, and deep perspective bokeh. Add heavy rain, water droplets on the lens, umbrella highlights, puddles, reflections, and moody steam-like atmosphere. Visual style: ultra-realistic street photography, cinematic film still, shallow depth of field, warm store light contrasting with cool dark rain, high dynamic range, 35mm lens feel, subtle grain, natural imperfections, no posed fashion look, no readable branding beyond generic convenience-store signs. Use Tokyo side street, heavy rain at night, oversized light beige rain jacket, and quiet melancholy and urban solitude.
